name: The Light of Summer
short_description: This is a short horror adventure game. вњіпёЋa Little Horror вњіпёЋadventure вњіпёЋ15min~30min вњіпёЋ1map вњіпёЋa Short Game вњіпёЋa Few Voices(only Japanese) вњіпёЋmulti-ending(3 Endings)
detailed_description:
This Is A Short Horror Adventure Game.

In one map room, the trials come one after another.
Make good use of what's around you and get through the ordeal.
The game is over when you run out of health in the upper left corner.

вњіпёЋstoryвњіпёЋ

вњіпёЋguide LineвњіпёЋ


вњіпёЋYou can do live play of this game or draw fan art.
вњіпёЋIf you're going to draw fan art, it would be nice if you could play this game once before you draw it.
вњіпёЋPlease don't hurt anyone with this game or this game's fan art.
вњіпёЋMareffy hopes that this game (including the fan art) will be truly enjoyed by everyone.
вњіпёЋPlease do not take the materials in the game's folder outside the game.
вњіпёЋPlease indicate "Spoiler Warning"when submitting a work that containsгЂЂimportant story spoilers.
We would appreciate it if you could put a cushion between your work and the viewers.
